creator: mpp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sandro Sigala wrote:
> diff -u -r1.8 comcontrol.8
> --- comcontrol.8	1996/01/30 16:32:10	1.8
> +++ comcontrol.8	1996/12/02 13:33:22
> @@ -44,7 +44,7 @@
>  startup script.
>  .Sh SEE ALSO
>  .Xr sio 4 ,
> -.Xr stty 1 .
> +.Xr stty 1

I don't really think that this is wrong.  Nothing I see in the mdoc
man pages says anything one way or the other.
